testcase.name: test_la_canada_2015
testcase.failure:
self = <census.tests.test_census.TestEncoding testMethod=test_la_canada_2015>
def test_la_canada_2015(self): """ The 'La Cañada Flintridge city, California' place can be a problem. """ geo = { 'for': 'place:39003', 'in': u'state:06' } self.assertEqual( > self._client.acs5.get('NAME', geo=geo).result()[0]['NAME'], # Changed to .result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ u'La Cañada Flintridge city, California' ) E AttributeError: 'list' object has no attribute 'result'
census/tests/test_census.py:119: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_acs1dp
testcase.failure:
self = <census.tests.test_census.TestEndpoints testMethod=test_acs1dp>
def test_acs1dp(self):
tests = ( ('us', 'United States'), ('state', 'Maryland'), ('state_congressional_district', 'Congressional District 6 (118th Congress), Maryland'), )
> self.check_endpoints('acs1dp', tests)
census/tests/test_census.py:231: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <census.tests.test_census.TestEndpoints testMethod=test_acs1dp> client_name = 'acs1dp' tests = (('us', 'United States'), ('state', 'Maryland'), ('state_congressional_district', 'Congressional District 6 (118th Congress), Maryland')) kwargs = {}, client = <census.core.ACS1DpClient object at 0x104a8d040> fields = ('NAME',), method_name = 'us', expected = 'United States' msg = 'acs1dp.us' method = <bound method Client.us of <census.core.ACS1DpClient object at 0x104a8d040>>
def check_endpoints(self, client_name, tests, **kwargs):
client = self.client(client_name) fields = ('NAME',)
for method_name, expected in tests:
msg = '{}.{}'.format(client_name, method_name)
method = getattr(client, method_name) > data = method(fields, **TEST_DATA, **kwargs).result() # Changed to .result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'list' object has no attribute 'result'
census/tests/test_census.py:146: AttributeError

def test_acs5(self):
